item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 immediately fires the anti-spiral brake, reframing the request as repeated local patching across touchpoints rather than a missing entrance-page note. It allows only a temporary emergency notice while explicitly preventing baseline lift and setting a structural consolidation deadline. Turn 2 keeps that contract under launch pressure: it permits the one-off temporary copy, states it is not a long-term entrance baseline, and preserves a 2026-07-12 structural review/consolidation deadline."}
